name: google-sheets
description: Google Sheets and Google Tasks share one Google connection.

marketplace.tagline: Read and write Google Sheets from agent workflows.
useCases: Sync CRM or form data into a structured sheet table
Generate weekly reports by appending agent run results
Read a sheet as a config or lookup source for an agent
marketplace.permissionsSummary: Access Google Sheets and Tasks data via OAuth.

seoOverview.heading: Integrate AI agents with Google Sheets
seoOverview.paragraph: Connect Google Sheets to an OrgSDK agent team and give workflows direct read and write access to your spreadsheets.
